description: FRONTIER: one rounding function uses banker's rounding for money; siblings use ordinary Math.round for display. v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: Accounting drift from biased rounding applied to monetary values

findings.rationale: roundCharge implements round-half-to-even because monetary totals must reconcile against the accounting system's exact rule; roundRating and roundProgress use ordinary Math.round for display. Unify them onto Math.round and every half-cent biases upward — systematic financial drift. A numeric-rounding detector should flag the divergent rounding logic; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
